description: Phase 9 Pro tier with LLM-powered intelligent threat detection at $29/month. Builds on open-source Phase 7-8 static analysis with AI-driven pattern recognition, contextual analysis, and zero-day threat detection.
businessValue: Primary revenue driver at $29/month Pro tier. LLM-powered detection catches sophisticated threats that static analysis misses. Expected to convert 10% of active users who need advanced AI security.

userStories.title: Add Phase 9 LLM detection to scanner API
userStories.description: As a Pro user, I want LLM-powered analysis that goes beyond static Phase 7-8 rules
acceptanceCriteria: LLM analyzes code context for zero-day patterns
LLM explains findings in natural language
Detection only runs for Pro/Team/Enterprise tiers
Verify: API returns LLM insights for Pro users

userStories.title: Implement LLM service integration
userStories.description: As an API, I need to connect to LLM service for intelligent analysis
acceptanceCriteria: Fallback to static analysis if LLM unavailable
Cache LLM responses for identical code
Rate limiting to control API costs

userStories.title: Add Pro tier check to scanner API
userStories.description: As an API, I need to verify Pro subscription before running Phase 9 LLM detection
acceptanceCriteria: API checks subscription tier from MSSQL via stored procedure
Auth0 JWT contains Pro tier claim
Phase 9 LLM only runs for Pro/Team/Enterprise
Free users get message about Pro features
Audit log tracks Pro feature usage in MSSQL
Verify: API returns 'upgrade_required' for free users

userStories.title: Create Pro upgrade flow in billing
userStories.description: As a free user, I want to upgrade to Pro for $29/month to get LLM detection
acceptanceCriteria: Auth0 user metadata updated with Pro tier

userStories.title: Create LLM prompt templates for threat detection
userStories.description: As a Pro scanner, I need optimized prompts for LLM threat analysis
acceptanceCriteria: Prompt for supply chain risk assessment

userStories.title: Add contextual threat intelligence
userStories.description: As a Pro scanner, I need LLM to understand code context and intent

userStories.title: Update CLI for Pro features
userStories.description: As a CLI user, I want to use Pro detection features with my subscription
acceptanceCriteria: CLI checks API key tier on scan
Shows Pro badge in scan output
--pro flag triggers LLM analysis via API
Test with real Pro API key

userStories.title: Create Pro features dashboard page
userStories.description: As a Pro user, I want to see my enhanced detection results in the dashboard
acceptanceCriteria: Dashboard shows LLM insights and explanations

userStories.title: Implement usage tracking for Pro features
userStories.description: As a business, I need to track Pro feature usage for analytics
acceptanceCriteria: Track LLM API calls and costs

userStories.title: Add Pro tier to pricing page
userStories.description: As a visitor, I want to understand Pro tier benefits on the pricing page
acceptanceCriteria: Lists LLM-powered detection beyond static analysis
Sign up button links to billing

userStories.title: Create Pro onboarding flow
userStories.description: As a new Pro user, I want guided onboarding to use advanced features
acceptanceCriteria: Welcome email with Pro features guide

userStories.title: Add Pro tier integration tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I need comprehensive tests for Pro tier functionality
acceptanceCriteria: Validate Pro API responses with AI insights
Test LLM service failures and fallbacks

risks.risk: Low conversion rate from free to Pro
risks.mitigation: A/B test pricing, offer 14-day trial, highlight AI threats
Extensive testing with real skills, adjustable thresholds
Use existing billing router, test thoroughly

launchChecklist: Phase 7-8 detection rules tested on 1000+ samples
Stripe Pro pricing configured and tested
Pro features documented in user guide
Support docs for Pro features written
Load testing completed for Pro detection
Security review of tier access controls
